questionHtml: Calculate the number of days that Scott can feed his dog with one bag of food.
markschemeHtml:
attempting to substitute their values into the term formula for arithmetic sequence equated to zero        (M1)

0=118.5+n-1×-1.5

n= 80 days        A1


Note: Follow through from part (a) only if their answer is positive.


[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the number of days that Scott can feed his dog with one bag of food.
